summary: The conversation is about booking a hotel room. Speaker 1 is looking for a room for two adults and two children for one night. Speaker 0 offers a family room for ₹5000. Speaker 1 checks the rate online and finds a lower rate of ₹2200-₹2400 for a comfort category room. However, Speaker 0 explains that the comfort category rooms are sold out and only family rooms are available. The discussion ends with Speaker 1 considering the family room option.

key_discussion_points.details: Speaker 0 has a private category room, which is a family room, available for ₹5000 per night. Speaker 1 is looking for a room for two adults and two children for one night.
Speaker 1 finds a lower rate of ₹2200-₹2400 for a comfort category room online. Speaker 0 explains that the rates online may not be up-to-date and that the comfort category rooms are sold out.
Speaker 1 is considering booking the family room. Speaker 0 warns that if the room is booked online and the payment is accepted, there may be a fine to pay.
